name: Suspicious WMPRVSE Child Process Detected
description: Detection of an unusual child process spawned by wmprvse.exe, indicating potential lateral movement or malicious code execution via WMI.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the suspicious child process was created.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID, expected to be 1 for Process Creation.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the suspicious process was created.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the suspicious child process executable.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (expected to be wmprvse.exe).

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of the child process.
